_comment: Bad case 12b — DEPARTURE_CLEARED suppression for cross-country. Same mechanics as 12a but the pilot used READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR which sets departure_type=CROSS_COUNTRY. atc_state_machine::check_auto_correction must skip the pattern auto-correction (see atc_state_machine.cpp:607-616) and leave the state at DEPARTURE_CLEARED. The pilot will later explicitly leave frequency — M3/M4 flows cover that follow-up.
name: Bad case 12b — DEPARTURE_CLEARED stays on cross-country (KPAO US)

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo at the ramp ready to taxi
Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo holding short ready for departure on course

say.note: Tower — VFR/cross-country departure → DEPARTURE_CLEARED with departure_type=CROSS_COUNTRY
say.text: Palo Alto Tower November One Two Three Alpha Bravo ready for departure VFR to San Carlos on course

say.note: 6 sec airborne — pattern auto-correction must be SUPPRESSED
